lead_profile_text: STL Switch — weighing selling vs STL conversion due to low LTL income and regulatory concerns. Has a stated minimum threshold of £750/month net to consider keeping the property. Two-person decision with wife.

top_objections.text: Weighing whether to sell rather than convert to STL
top_objections.zac_response: STL projections (~£1,600/mo net) clearly exceed stated minimum threshold of £750/mo

top_objections.text: Two-person decision — needs wife's input before committing
top_objections.zac_response: Follow-up call agreed after Robert's holiday (around the 29th)

top_questions.text: Can STL generate enough to make it worth keeping the property?
top_questions.answer: Projections indicate ~£1,600/mo net before owner costs, well above the £750 target

top_questions.text: What does the management model look like day-to-day?
top_questions.answer: Fully hands-off: Stayful handles guests, maintenance, cleaning; owner handles mortgage, utilities, Wi-Fi

what_moved_them: Projections clearly exceeding his stated minimum threshold (£750 target vs £1,600 projected)
Fully hands-off model addressed management burden concern

conversion_gaps.gap: Two-person decision — wife not on call
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Ensure wife is present on follow-up call; send written summary of projections they can review together
Send setup quote based on property photos
